title: SNAP!

sections.heading: WHAT YOU'LL NEED TO PLAY
sections.middleText1:
two single or multi-message switches
record:
"next" on one switch 
"snap!" on the other
sections.middleText2: cards or motivating images / symbols e.g. animals, vehicles etc.

sections.heading: HOW TO PLAY
sections.body:
1. Lay down a card or a motivating image.
2. When the switch user presses "next", place another card on top of the previous one to form a pile.
3. When two identical cards appear after each other, the switch user can press "snap!" to win a point.

tooltipText: Use 2 switches to scan through motivating images to play the matching game 'Snap!'
